chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-1143 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing of Case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2025. Mr. Ali Zardari, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. ------------------------------------ Petitioner through instant petition seeks following relief:- a) To direct the respondents, and their subordinates to not lodge any FIR against the petitioner and his relatives, at any police station of Karachi division. b) To direct the officials respondents to provide legal protection to the life, liberty and assets of the petitioner and his family and well- wishers. c) To restrain the official respondents and private respondents, their agents, employees, puppets, colleagues, subordinates, workers, person, persons, men, or any other person acting on their behalf from causing harassment, humiliation, pressure, fear and mental torture or threatening to the petitioner or booking the petitioner, his friends, family members, employees and well-wishers in any of the false and fabricated case in any police station of District Malir, East and Karachi Division, without due course of law. d) Any other relief or relieves which this Honourable Court may deem fit and proper under the circumstances of the case. e) Cost of the petition. Pursuant to court notices official respondents have filed their comments, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clauses official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner.

Pursuant to court notices official respondents have filed their comments, which are taken on record, wherein it is undertaken that no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Learned AAG and DPG submits that in terms of prayer clauses official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and no harassment would be caused to the petitioner. Petitioner seeks disposal of the instant petition in view of the reply filed by the official respondents and statement made by the AAG & DPG. Order accordingly. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith all pending applications. A copy of this order shall be sent to SSP (East) Karachi for compliance. JUDGE
